options: The amount of energy transferred per unit time
The total amount of energy in a system
The speed at which an object is moving
The force applied to an object
correct_answer: The amount of energy transferred per unit time
explanation: Power measures how quickly energy is being used or transferred. If you transfer a lot of energy very quickly, you have high power; if you transfer the same energy slowly, you have low power.
source_name: KS3 Physics Curriculum - Energy and Power
